description:
OL 316 (REV. 2/2017)  WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle was in manual mode, stopped at a red light at the intersection of Mason St. and Sutter St. facing south. A vehicle behind it 
made low-speed contact with the rear of the Zoox vehicle. There was no damage. Police were not called. 
Go to Page 3
